publishedAbstract: In some instances, generally coming from a standalone Multicloud Object Storage (MCG) deployment to a full ODF Ceph Internal/External cluster, it may be desired to migrate the database storageclass to an ODF Ceph storageclass. This solution will cover those steps. **Related Articles:** [Migrating From Standalone Multicloud Gateway (MCG/NooBaa) to ODF/Ceph Full Deployment (Deployed Using StorageCluster)- OpenShift Data Foundation (ODF)](https://access.redhat.com/solutions/7055285) **WARNING: IF STEPS ARE NOT FOLLOWED EXACTLY IN THIS SOLUTION, IT MAY CAUSE COMPLETE NOOBAA DATA LOSS.**
publishedTitle: How to Migrate the db-noobaa-db-pg-<pvc-name> StorageClass to Ceph RBD after Migrating from Standalone Multicloud Object Gateway (MCG) to Full Openshift Data Foundation (ODF) Internal Deployment v4.18 and Below
